page.title: Mobile Money — Salary transfers
page.subtitle: Wave · MTN MoMo · Orange Money CI

campaign.goToPayrollHint: Go to Payroll → Close a period for this month, then come back.

bank.title: Salary bank transfer
bank.subtitle: Generates an Excel file per bank (beneficiaries + IBAN + amounts) and emails it to the bank. The sender is your company's configured email.
bank.empty: No employee paid by bank transfer for this period (check employees' payment method + IBAN).
bank.sendError: Send failed — check emails and tenant SMTP.
